# Third-Party Notices

Stagent vendors the following open-source components for the CodeAct implementation engine.

## OpenHands Software Agent SDK

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Components | `openhands-sdk`, `openhands-tools` |
| Version | **1.28.0** |
| License | [MIT](software-agent-sdk/LICENSE) |
| Upstream | https://github.com/OpenHands/software-agent-sdk |
| Vendored path | `vendors/software-agent-sdk/openhands-sdk/`, `vendors/software-agent-sdk/openhands-tools/` |
| Copyright | Copyright (c) 2026 OpenHands contributors |

Permission is granted under the MIT License to use, copy, modify, merge, publish,
distribute, sublicense, and/or sell copies of the Software, subject to inclusion
of the above copyright notice and permission notice in all copies or substantial
portions of the Software.

**Not vendored** (intentionally excluded): `openhands-agent-server`, `openhands-workspace`,
OpenHands-main `enterprise/`, Agent Canvas UI.

See `vendors/software-agent-sdk/VENDOR_INFO.md` for upgrade procedure.
